name: AWS Solutions Architect
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y unzip jq zip tree wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common && curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o awscliv2.zip && unzip -o awscliv2.zip && sudo ./aws/install && rm -rf aws awscliv2.zip && . /etc/os-release && wget -q https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/$VERSION_ID/packages-microsoft-prod.deb && sudo dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb && rm packages-microsoft-prod.deb && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y powershell
